**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## gpio-controller

Property name: `gpio-controller`

Value type: `<empty>`

The presence of a `gpio-controller` property marks the node as a GPIO controller node.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
- gpio-controller: Marks the device as a GPIO controller
- nr-gpios: The number of pins supported by the controller.

The GPIO expander can optionally be used as an interrupt controller, in
which case it uses the default two cell specifier as described in
Documentation/devicetree/bindings/interrupt-controller/interrupts.txt.
```
